metaTitle: Cold Rooms For Sale San Diego, CA | Beverage Equipment Traders
metaDescription: New and used cold rooms shipping to San Diego, California. Walk-in coolers, cold rooms, and cold boxes for temperature-controlled storage in brewing and bevera. Ships from San Marcos, CA. Rigging and installation available.
h1: Cold Rooms For Sale — San Diego, CA
heroBody: Beverage Equipment Traders ships new and used cold rooms to San Diego and nationwide from our 40,000 sq ft facility in San Marcos, CA. Every piece photographed, documented, and priced. Rigging and installation available at destination.
bodyHeading: Cold Rooms Shipping to San Diego — What to Know
locationParagraph: For San Diego area buyers, in-person inspection of equipment at our San Marcos facility is available by appointment. Local rigging and installation jobs typically turn around within 1 to 2 weeks.
marketParagraph: Beverage Equipment Traders ships to all 50 states and serves buyers across North America. The San Diego market is one of many active markets we work in — contact us regardless of your location and we will advise on current inventory and freight timing.
sidebarHeading: Ship Cold Rooms to San Diego
sidebarBody: Our trade desk responds within one business day. Provide your requirements and we will return current inventory and a freight quote to San Diego.
inventoryHeading: Featured Cold Rooms — Ships to San Diego
faqHeading: Cold Rooms San Diego — Frequently Asked Questions
finalCtaHeading: Sourcing Cold Rooms in San Diego?
finalCtaBody: We ship from San Marcos, CA. Every piece photographed and condition-documented. Rigging and installation available in San Diego and nationwide.
